items.description: A Budget Tracker is a financial management application that helps users record, monitor, and manage their income and expenses efficiently. items.name: Smart-AI-Healthcare
items.description: A real-time AI and Machine Learning based healthcare application that predicts diseases from user symptoms using text, voice, and image inputs. The system supports multilingual communication, severity analysis, diet recommendations, PDF report generation, and nearby hospital navigation for smart medical assistance.
